text: and responsiveness Switch between models anytime based on what you need. Installing Claude in Chrome Open a Google Chrome browser window. Note: Claude in Chrome is not supported on other Chromium-based web browsers or mobile devices. Open a Google Chrome browser window. Note: Claude in Chrome is not supported on other Chromium-based web browsers or mobile devices. Note: Claude in Chrome is not supported on other Chromium-based web browsers or mobile devices. Visit the Chrome Web Store to find Claude in Chrome. Visit the Chrome Web Store to find Claude in Chrome. Click "Add to Chrome" to install the extension. Click "Add to Chrome" to install the extension. Sign in with your Claude account credentials when prompted. Sign in with your Claude account credentials when prompted. Pin the extension by clicking the puzzle piece icon, then the thumbtack next to "Claude." Pin the extension by clicking the puzzle piece icon, then the thumbtack next to "Claude." Grant the necessary permissions to enable Claude to interact with your browser. Grant the necessary permissions to enable Claude to interact with your browser. The Claude icon will appear in your Chrome toolbar. Click it to open Claude in a side panel that stays visible while you browse. Permissions required to install Claude in Chrome You will need to grant Claude in Chrome the following permissions to install and use the extension: Permission Permission Why Claude Needs This Why Claude Needs This sidePanel sidePanel This lets Claude appear as a panel on the side of your browser, so you can chat with Claude while browsing any website. This lets Claude appear as a panel on the side of your browser, so you can chat with Claude while browsing any website. storage storage This lets Claude save your preferences so they're still there when you close and reopen your browser. This lets Claude save your preferences so they're still there when you close and reopen your browser. scripting scripting This lets Claude read text on webpages so it can help you with tasks. This lets Claude read text on webpages so it can help you with tasks. debugger debugger This is what allows Claude to actually control your browser – clicking buttons, typing text, and taking screenshots – when you ask it to complete tasks for you. This is what allows Claude to actually control your browser – clicking buttons, typing text, and taking screenshots
